caption: A group of men are gathered in an indoor setting, likely for a press briefing, as microphones are held up toward the central figure. The main man speaking wears glasses and a white shirt, while the men surrounding him wear traditional Indian attire, including a tan shawl and dark jackets. The scene remains consistent across the sequence, with the men standing close together and interacting with reporters. A red news ticker and graphics overlay the footage, featuring the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo and a timestamp of "10:04 PM". The on-screen text evolves from the first frame to the last, shifting from "सब्रट चौधरी," to "सब्रट चौधरी, विजय सिन्हा को भी P", and finally to "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की पिक्चर" and "सब्रट चौधरी, विजय सिन्हा को भी PM ने बधाई दी". Other text fragments like "डि़ष्टी CM" and "मंत्री" are visible throughout the frames.
